differential_diagnoses: Viral encephalitis (non-HSV, e.g., HHV-6 or VZV)
Primary angiitis of the central nervous system (PACNS)
Alzheimer's disease with co-morbid vascular pathology
next_steps: Send serum and CSF for autoimmune and paraneoplastic encephalitis panels
Send CSF for cytology and flow cytometry to evaluate for malignancy
Consider brain biopsy if non-invasive workup is nondiagnostic
Start empirical treatment with high-dose intravenous glucocorticoids
Continuous video-EEG monitoring to guide titration of anti-seizure medication
Perform whole-body PET/CT to evaluate for occult malignancy
